title: The Franky Family’s Attack
description: Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Usoppp, Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro. Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We will duel for the right...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Go off and chill if you understand!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Didn't they come here during the day!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why didn't you just finish them off!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's no point arguing about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Chopper, didn't you run after usop...?...?

dialogue.speaker: Usoppp
dialogue.text: I wanted to finish treating him...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But he forced me to come back...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: usopp is in the city now...

summary: Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.
